```text
1	"""步骤⑫ 步骤后校验 —— 点了不等于点对了 (防假操作).
2	
3	执行完动作后, 把 动作类型/意图/分发结果/当前DOM摘要 发给大模型判断"真成功"还是"执行了但结果不对".
4	关键: 分发消息里"实际点击目标"是否与意图一致 —— 点错必须判假.
5	输入/上传: 值不符合占位符/格式说明必须判假.
6	悬停: 菜单/下拉类悬停后检查 menuitem 是否仍全部 [hidden], 并校验是否悬停到触发器而非内层 span.
7	输入锚点窗口: 输入后校验时, 在DOM摘要里找与值匹配的输入框行, 取前后各60行.
8	"""
9	from __future__ import annotations
10	
11	from dataclasses import dataclass
12	from typing import Any, Optional
13	
14	from ..dom import extract_semantic_dom
15	from ..llm import LLMAdapter, PromptLoader
16	from ..planning import PlannedAction
17	
18	# 需要后校验的动作类型 (断言/等待/跳转自身即结果, 不再二次校验)
19	_POST_CHECK_TYPES = {"click", "fill", "press", "upload", "hover"}
20	
21	# 悬停类 intent 若含这些词, 认为目标是展开菜单/下拉, 需做可见性判断
22	_MENU_HOVER_MARKERS = ("菜单", "下拉", "用户", "悬浮", "悬停", "hover")
23	
24	_DEFAULT_SYSTEM = """\
25	你是"步骤后校验器", 判断一个 UI 操作是否真的达成了意图 (而非"执行了但结果不对").
26	
27	规则:
28	1. 分发成功=false → 倾向 step_ok=false.
29	2. 分发成功=true → 仍要判断是"真成功"还是"点错地方/输入了错值".
30	3. 关键: 分发消息中"实际目标"元素是否与意图一致 —— 点错(如想点确定却点了取消)必须 step_ok=false.
31	4. 输入/上传: 值不符合占位符或格式说明 → step_ok=false.
32	5. 悬停: 若意图是展开菜单/下拉, 悬停后相关 menuitem 仍全部 hidden → step_ok=false.
33	6. 失败时给出原因, 并给重试建议:
34	   retry_focus ∈ "值"|"选择器"|"两者"|"无"; suggested_value(改值时的新值); resolve_hint(换元素时的提示).
35	只输出 JSON:
36	{"step_ok": true/false, "reason": "...", "retry_focus": "无", "suggested_value": null, "resolve_hint": null}"""
37	
38	_DEFAULT_USER = """\
39	动作类型: {{action_type}}
40	操作意图: {{intent}}
41	输入值: {{value}}
42	分发成功: {{ok}}
43	分发消息: {{message}}
44	
45	当前页面DOM摘要:
46	{{dom}}
47	
48	请输出 JSON。"""
49	
50	
51	@dataclass
52	class PostCheckResult:
53	    """后校验输出: 是否真成功, 以及失败时下一轮重试应该调整什么."""
54	
55	    step_ok: bool
56	    reason: str = ""
57	    retry_focus: str = "无"          # 值 | 选择器 | 两者 | 无
58	    suggested_value: Optional[str] = None
59	    resolve_hint: Optional[str] = None
60	
61	
62	def should_post_check(action: PlannedAction) -> bool:
63	    """只对可能发生"执行成功但目标不对"的动作做后校验."""
64	    return action.type in _POST_CHECK_TYPES
65	
66	
67	class PostStepChecker:
68	    """调用 LLM 判断动作执行结果是否符合真实业务意图."""
69	
70	    def __init__(self, llm: LLMAdapter, prompts: PromptLoader) -> None:
71	        self.llm = llm
72	        self.prompts = prompts
73	
74	    def check(
75	        self,
76	        page: Any,
77	        action: PlannedAction,
78	        dispatch_ok: bool,
79	        dispatch_msg: str,
80	    ) -> PostCheckResult:
81	        # 后校验需要基于执行后的最新页面状态判断.
82	        dom = extract_semantic_dom(page, dialog_first=True)
83	
84	        if action.type == "hover":
85	            code_result = _check_hover_visibility(action.intent, dispatch_ok, dispatch_msg, dom)
86	            if code_result is not None:
87	                return code_result
88	
89	        if action.type == "fill" and action.value:
90	            # 输入类动作通常只关心输入框附近 DOM, 截窗降低 prompt 噪声.
91	            dom = _input_anchor_window(dom, action.value)
92	
93	        system = self.prompts.system("post_check", _DEFAULT_SYSTEM)
94	        user = self.prompts.user(
95	            "post_check", _DEFAULT_USER,
96	            action_type=action.type, intent=action.intent, value=action.value,
97	            ok=str(dispatch_ok).lower(), message=dispatch_msg, dom=dom,
98	        )
99	        try:
100	            data = self.llm.complete_json("post_check", system, user).data
101	        except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
102	            # 校验器本身失败时, 退回到分发结果, 不误杀
103	            return PostCheckResult(step_ok=dispatch_ok, reason=f"后校验调用失败: {e}")
104	
105	        if not isinstance(data, dict):
106	            return PostCheckResult(step_ok=dispatch_ok, reason="后校验返回非JSON")
107	        # 模型字段缺失时退回分发结果, 避免后校验不稳定导致误判失败.
108	        return PostCheckResult(
109	            step_ok=bool(data.get("step_ok", dispatch_ok)),
110	            reason=str(data.get("reason") or ""),
111	            retry_focus=str(data.get("retry_focus") or "无"),
112	            suggested_value=_opt_str(data.get("suggested_value")),
113	            resolve_hint=_opt_str(data.get("resolve_hint")),
114	        )
115	
116	
117	def _hover_needs_menu_open(intent: str) -> bool:
118	    """判断悬停意图是否要求展开菜单/下拉面板."""
119	    text = (intent or "").lower()
120	    return any(m.lower() in text for m in _MENU_HOVER_MARKERS)
121	
122	
123	def _scan_menu_visibility(dom: str) -> tuple[int, int, bool]:
124	    """统计 DOM 摘要中 menu/menuitem 的可见与 hidden 数量; 第三项表示是否出现过菜单相关行."""
125	    hidden = visible = 0
126	    found = False
127	    for line in dom.split("\n"):
128	        low = line.lower()
129	        if "menuitem" not in low and 'role="menu"' not in low and "role=menu" not in low:
130	            continue
131	        found = True
132	        if "[hidden]" in line:
133	            hidden += 1
134	        else:
135	            visible += 1
136	    return hidden, visible, found
137	
138	
139	def _hover_hit_inner_span(dispatch_msg: str) -> bool:
140	    """分发消息显示实际悬停在内层 span, 而非 button 触发器."""
141	    msg = (dispatch_msg or "").lower()
142	    return "<span" in msg and "role=\"button\"" not in msg and "role=button" not in msg
143	
144	
145	def _check_hover_visibility(
146	    intent: str,
147	    dispatch_ok: bool,
148	    dispatch_msg: str,
149	    dom: str,
150	) -> Optional[PostCheckResult]:
151	    """悬停后的代码级可见性判断; 明确失败/成功时直接返回, 否则交 LLM."""
152	    if not _hover_needs_menu_open(intent):
153	        return None
154	    if not dispatch_ok:
155	        return None
156	
157	    hidden, visible, found = _scan_menu_visibility(dom)
158	    if not found:
159	        return None
160	
161	    if visible > 0:
162	        return PostCheckResult(
163	            step_ok=True,
164	            reason=f"悬停后已有 {visible} 个可见菜单项, 下拉已展开",
165	            retry_focus="无",
166	        )
167	
168	    if hidden > 0:
169	        hint = (
170	            "悬停 role=button 或 haspopup=menu 的下拉触发容器, "
171	            "不要只悬停内层 span 文本节点"
172	        )
173	        if _hover_hit_inner_span(dispatch_msg):
174	            hint = (
175	                "实际悬停到了内层 span, 应改为悬停外层 "
176	                "[role=button][haspopup=menu] 触发器"
177	            )
178	        return PostCheckResult(
179	            step_ok=False,
180	            reason=f"悬停后菜单项仍全部 hidden(共 {hidden} 个), 下拉未展开",
181	            retry_focus="选择器",
182	            resolve_hint=hint,
183	        )
184	    return None
185	
186	
187	def _input_anchor_window(dom: str, value: str, radius: int = 60) -> str:
188	    """在DOM摘要里找含 value 的行, 取前后各 radius 行作为锚点窗口."""
189	    lines = dom.split("\n")
190	    hit = next((i for i, ln in enumerate(lines) if value in ln), None)
191	    if hit is None:
192	        return dom
193	    start = max(0, hit - radius)
194	    end = min(len(lines), hit + radius + 1)
195	    return "\n".join(lines[start:end])
196	
197	
198	def _opt_str(v) -> Optional[str]:
199	    """把模型可选字段归一成 None 或非空字符串."""
200	    if v is None:
201	        return None
202	    s = str(v).strip()
203	    return s or None
204
```
</details></tool-use>

The user is saying that the actual click didn't select "策略投放" at all - the dropdown option wasn't actually selected in the browser. So the problem is that the click action didn't actually work on the dropdown option.

Let me think about what's happening:
1. Step 01: Click on 来源 combobox → dropdown opens (user confirmed they see options)
2. Step 02: Try to click '策略' option
   - Rule engine matches `text=策略` → finds `<div>策略投放</div>`
   - Playwright clicks it
   - But the dropdown option wasn't actually selected

The problem is that `text=策略` matches `<div>策略投放</div>` but clicking on that div might not actually trigger the selection event. Ant Design dropdown options typically have a specific structure like:


```html
<div class="ant-select-item-option">
  <div class="ant-select-item-option-content">策略投放</div>
</div>
```

So the `text=策略` selector might be hitting just the content div rather than the clickable option element itself, which means the click never actually registers as a selection. The user also mentioned that before, the DOM snapshot was empty (0 items), which means the snapshot script was failing entirely. Even after fixing the CSS selector issue, if the DOM snapshot isn't capturing the dropdown options properly, then the rule engine can't find them and falls back to matching by text substring.

The real problem is that clicking on `<div>策略投放</div>` didn't actually select it in the browser. This could mean the element being clicked is just the option text rather than the actual clickable container, or there's a timing issue where the click didn't register properly. I should look at the DOM snapshot from when Step 02 executed to see what options were actually visible and whether the click target was correct.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:19:49Z)**_

这是两个问题叠加：

2. 即使现在修复了快照，`text=策略` 匹配到的可能只是选项文本的叶子节点，不是可点击的选项容器

Ant Design 的选项结构通常是：
```html
<div class="ant-select-item-option">     ← 需要点这个
  <div>策略投放</div>                     ← text=策略 只匹配到这个叶子
</div>
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./core/skill_loader.py`

```text
1	"""步骤㉒ 组件库知识 (技能) —— 教 AI 认识 UI 组件.
2	
3	技能.md: YAML frontmatter 定义组件 HTML 结构, 正文描述操作语义.
4	加载策略: 选择类组件(select/tree/cascader)保留完整 HTML(对规则匹配影响最大),
5	其他组件只保留名称索引. 注入到步骤⑥ 动作规划的系统提示词.
6	"""
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	from pathlib import Path
10	from typing import Any
11	
12	import yaml
13	
14	# 保留完整 HTML 的"选择类"组件类别
15	_FULL_HTML_CATEGORIES = {"select", "tree", "cascader"}
16	
17	
18	def load_skill_text(path: str | Path) -> str:
19	    """读取 skill.md 并整理成适合注入 LLM system prompt 的文本."""
20	    p = Path(path)
21	    if not p.exists():
22	        return ""
23	    raw = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
24	    front, body = _split_frontmatter(raw)
25	    meta = yaml.safe_load(front) if front else {}
26	    components = (meta or {}).get("components", []) if isinstance(meta, dict) else []
27	
28	    lines: list[str] = ["# UI 组件知识 (技能)", "", "## 组件索引"]
29	    full_html_blocks: list[str] = []
30	    for c in components:
31	        if not isinstance(c, dict):
32	            continue
33	        name = c.get("name", "")
34	        category = c.get("category", "")
35	        # 所有组件都进入索引, 让模型知道项目里有哪些 UI 组件类型.
36	        lines.append(f"- {name} (类型: {category})")
37	        if category in _FULL_HTML_CATEGORIES and c.get("html"):
38	            # 选择类组件结构复杂, 保留完整 HTML 帮助规划阶段理解交互方式.
39	            full_html_blocks.append(f"### {name}\n```html\n{c['html'].rstrip()}\n```")
40	
41	    if full_html_blocks:
42	        lines.append("")
43	        lines.append("## 选择类组件完整结构")
44	        lines.extend(full_html_blocks)
45	
46	    if body.strip():
47	        lines.append("")
48	        lines.append(body.strip())
49	
50	    return "\n".join(lines)
51	
52	
53	def _split_frontmatter(text: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
54	    """切出 --- 包裹的 YAML frontmatter 与正文."""
55	    t = text.lstrip()
56	    if not t.startswith("---"):
57	        return "", text
58	    parts = t.split("---", 2)
59	    if len(parts) >= 3:
60	        return parts[1], parts[2]
61	    return "", text
62
```
</details></tool-use>

好主意。我来设计一个**框架识别 + 框架专属选择器**的结构：



_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:27:22Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""前端框架识别 —— 从页面 DOM 特征判断使用的组件库.

在测试用例执行开始时跑一次, 识别结果写入 profile, 后续 DOM 快照/定位链
使用该框架的专属选择器, 提高元素定位成功率.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any, Optional

# 框架探测脚本: 检查页面中是否存在该框架特有的全局变量或 DOM class
_DETECT_JS = """
() => {
  const checks = [
    // Ant Design / Ant Design Vue
    { name: 'ant-design', test: () => document.querySelector('.ant-modal, .ant-select-dropdown, .ant-message, [class*="ant-pro-"]') !== null },
    // Element Plus
    { name: 'element-plus', test: () => document.querySelector('.el-dialog, .el-select-dropdown, .el-message, [class*="el-loading"]') !== null },
    // Element UI (Vue 2)
    { name: 'element-ui', test: () => document.querySelector('.el-dialog, .el-select-dropdown, .el-message') !== null },
    // Naive UI
    { name: 'naive-ui', test: () => document.querySelector('[class*="n-modal"], [class*="n-select"], [class*="n-message"]') !== null },
    // Arco Design
    { name: 'arco-design', test: () => document.querySelector('[class*="arco-modal"], [class*="arco-select"], [class*="arco-message"]') !== null },
  ];

  const results = [];
  for (const c of checks) {
    try { results.push({ name: c.name, found: c.test() }); }
    catch { results.push({ name: c.name, found: false }); }
  }
  return results;
}
"""

# 各框架专属 DOM 选择器配置
FRAMEWORK_PROFILES: dict[str, dict[str, str]] = {
    'ant-design': {
        'container_sel': '.ant-select, .ant-picker, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.ant-select-dropdown, .ant-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.ant-select-item-option, .ant-dropdown-menu-item, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .ant-modal, .ant-modal-confirm',
        'form_sel': 'form, .ant-form',
        'table_sel': '.ant-table, .ant-table-tbody, .ant-table-thead',
    },
    'element-plus': {
        'container_sel': '.el-select, .el-date-editor, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.el-select-dropdown, .el-picker-panel, .el-dropdown-menu, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.el-select-dropdown__item, .el-dropdown-menu__item, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .el-drawer',
        'form_sel': 'form, .el-form',
        'table_sel': '.el-table, .el-table__body, .el-table__header',
    },
    'element-ui': {
        'container_sel': '.el-select, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.el-select-dropdown, .el-dropdown-menu, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.el-select-dropdown__item, .el-dropdown-menu__item, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .el-drawer',
        'form_sel': 'form, .el-form',
        'table_sel': '.el-table, .el-table__body, .el-table__header',
    },
    'naive-ui': {
        'container_sel': '.n-select, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.n-base-select-menu, .n-dropdown-menu, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.n-base-select-menu-item, .n-dropdown-menu-item, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .n-modal, .n-dialog',
        'form_sel': 'form, .n-form',
        'table_sel': '.n-data-table, .n-data-table-thead, .n-data-table-tbody',
    },
    'arco-design': {
        'container_sel': '.arco-select, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.arco-select-dropdown, .arco-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.arco-select-option, .arco-dropdown-option, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .arco-modal, .arco-modal-confirm',
        'form_sel': 'form, .arco-form',
        'table_sel': '.arco-table, .arco-table-body, .arco-table-header',
    },
    # 默认: 兼容所有框架的通用选择器
    'default': {
        'container_sel': '.el-select, .ant-select, .n-select, .arco-select, [aria-haspopup]',
        'dropdown_sel': '.ant-select-dropdown, .el-select-dropdown, .n-base-select-menu, .arco-select-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
        'option_sel': '.ant-select-item-option, .el-select-dropdown__item, .n-base-select-menu-item, .arco-select-option, [role="option"]',
        'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .ant-modal, .n-modal, .arco-modal, .el-drawer',
        'form_sel': 'form, .el-form, .ant-form, .n-form, .arco-form',
        'table_sel': '.el-table, .ant-table, .n-data-table, .arco-table',
    },
}


def detect_framework(page: Any) -> str:
    """探测页面使用的组件库框架, 返回框架名或 'default'.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page 对象.

    Returns:
        框架名, 如 'ant-design', 'element-plus', 'element-ui' 等;
        探测失败或未找到时返回 'default'.
    """
    try:
        results = page.evaluate(_DETECT_JS)
    except Exception:
        return 'default'

    if not isinstance(results, list):
        return 'default'

    # 返回第一个命中的框架
    for r in results:
        if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get('found'):
            return r['name']

    return 'default'


def get_framework_selectors(framework: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    """获取指定框架的 DOM 选择器配置.

    Args:
        framework: 框架名, 如 'ant-design', 'element-plus' 等.

    Returns:
        选择器字典, 含 container_sel, dropdown_sel, option_sel, dialog_sel, form_sel, table_sel.
    """
    return FRAMEWORK_PROFILES.get(framework, FRAMEWORK_PROFILES['default'])

```

```text
45	
46	# 组件操作语义 (供动作规划参考)
47	
48	- **下拉选择 el-select**: 不是原生 `<select>`, 不能 select_option. 必须拆成两步:
49	  ① 点击下拉框容器展开; ② 在弹出选项中点击目标选项. 规划时分别产出"点击X下拉框"和"在弹出选项中点击Y"两条动作.
50	- **级联地区选择(省/市/区)**: 三个下拉按顺序操作, 选完省份才能选城市, 选完城市才能选区县. 顺序: 点省→选省值→点市→选市值→点区→选区值.
51	- **树形选择**: 展开/收起点 `展开图标`; 勾选点节点上的复选框. "勾选树节点X"要分清是展开还是勾选.
52	- **复选框/开关**: 直接点击对应标签或开关本体.
53	- **对话框 el-dialog**: 关闭点右上角关闭按钮(× 图标, 通常 `.el-dialog__headerbtn`). "关闭X弹窗"产出一条点击动作即可.
54	- **商品卡片**: 列表里的卡片常是无语义 class 的 div(@click 跳详情), 点击商品名文本即可冒泡触发. "点击第一个商品X"产出一条点击动作.
55
```

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:29:30Z)**_

Now simplify the framework detector - it just detects the framework name, selectors come from skill:



_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:30:00Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""前端框架识别 —— 从页面 DOM 特征判断使用的组件库.

在测试用例执行开始时跑一次, 返回框架名.
选择器从 skill.md 的 framework_selectors 加载.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any

_DETECT_JS = """
() => {
  const checks = [
    { name: 'ant-design', test: () => document.querySelector('.ant-modal, .ant-select-dropdown, .ant-message, [class*="ant-pro-"]') !== null },
    { name: 'element-plus', test: () => document.querySelector('.el-dialog, .el-select-dropdown, .el-message') !== null },
    { name: 'element-ui', test: () => document.querySelector('.el-dialog, .el-select-dropdown, .el-message') !== null },
    { name: 'naive-ui', test: () => document.querySelector('[class*="n-modal"], [class*="n-select"]') !== null },
    { name: 'arco-design', test: () => document.querySelector('[class*="arco-modal"], [class*="arco-select"]') !== null },
  ];
  const results = [];
  for (const c of checks) {
    try { results.push({ name: c.name, found: c.test() }); }
    catch { results.push({ name: c.name, found: false }); }
  }
  return results;
}
"""


def detect_framework(page: Any) -> str:
    """探测页面使用的组件库框架, 返回框架名或 'default'.

    Args:
        page: Playwright page 对象.

    Returns:
        框架名, 如 'ant-design', 'element-plus' 等;
        探测失败或未找到时返回 'default'.
    """
    try:
        results = page.evaluate(_DETECT_JS)
    except Exception:
        return 'default'

    if not isinstance(results, list):
        return 'default'

    for r in results:
        if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get('found'):
            return r['name']

    return 'default'

```

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:30:29Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./core/dom/semantic_dom.py`

```text
1	"""步骤⑧ 语义DOM抽取 —— 给大模型一个能看懂的页面素描.
2	
3	在浏览器执行 JS 遍历 DOM, 提取对 UI 自动化有意义的元素列表.
4	【重点2】弹窗/表单优先: 检测到弹窗(dialog)或表单(form)时, 把其内部节点排到最前,
5	避免被截断, 让定位/就绪检查优先看弹窗、表单内的状态.
6	
7	迁移自旧 core/dom_snapshot.py, 新增:
8	  - in_dialog / in_form 标记
9	  - wait_for_dom_stable(): 变更观察器, DOM 安静 200ms 后才抽取
10	  - dialog_first 排序
11	"""
12	from __future__ import annotations
13	
14	from typing import Any
15	
16	def _build_snapshot_js(
17	    container_sel: str = '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]',
18	    dropdown_sel: str = '.ant-select-dropdown, .el-select-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
19	    option_sel: str = '.ant-select-item-option, .el-select-dropdown__item, [role="option"]',
20	    dialog_sel: str = '[role="dialog"], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .ant-modal, .el-drawer',
21	    form_sel: str = 'form, .el-form, .ant-form',
22	) -> str:
23	    """构建 DOM 快照 JS 脚本, 支持注入框架专属选择器."""
24	    return r"""
25	() => {
26	  const SEL = [
27	    'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]',
28	    '[onclick]',
29	    '[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"]',
30	    'label',
31	    'summary',
32	  ].join(',');
33	  const CONTAINER_SEL = '__CONTAINER_SEL__';
34	  const DROPDOWN_SEL = '__DROPDOWN_SEL__';
35	  const OPTION_SEL = '__OPTION_SEL__';
36	  const DIALOG_SEL = '__DIALOG_SEL__';
37	  const FORM_SEL = '__FORM_SEL__';
38	  const items = [];
39	  const seen = new Map();
40	
41	  function closestMatch(el, sel) {
42	    let cur = el;
43	    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
44	      if (cur.matches && cur.matches(sel)) return true;
45	      cur = cur.parentElement;
46	    }
47	    return false;
48	  }
49	""".replace('__CONTAINER_SEL__', container_sel) \
50	      .replace('__DROPDOWN_SEL__', dropdown_sel) \
51	      .replace('__OPTION_SEL__', option_sel) \
52	      .replace('__DIALOG_SEL__', dialog_sel) \
53	      .replace('__FORM_SEL__', form_sel)
54	
55	
56	# 默认快照脚本 (向后兼容)
57	_SNAPSHOT_JS = r"""
58	() => {
59	  // 只抓对自动化有意义的交互元素和语义元素, 避免把整棵 DOM 塞给 LLM.
60	  const SEL = [
61	    'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]',
62	    '[onclick]',
63	    '[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"]',
64	    'label',
65	    'summary',
66	  ].join(',');
67	  // 组件库容器: 含表单内的 select 触发器 + 下拉面板容器 + 下拉选项
68	  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]';
69	  const DROPDOWN_SEL = '.ant-select-dropdown, .el-select-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]';
70	  const OPTION_SEL = '.ant-select-item-option, .el-select-dropdown__item, [role="option"]';
71	  const DIALOG_SEL = '[role=dialog], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .ant-modal, .el-drawer';
72	  const FORM_SEL = 'form, .el-form, .ant-form';
73	  const items = [];
74	  // seen 用来限制完全相同元素最多保留 3 个, 防止列表页把 prompt 撑爆.
75	  const seen = new Map();
76	
77	  function closestMatch(el, sel) {
78	    let cur = el;
79	    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
80	      if (cur.matches && cur.matches(sel)) return true;
81	      cur = cur.parentElement;
82	    }
83	    return false;
84	  }
85	
86	  function findScope(el) {
87	    // scope 提供最近的稳定父容器线索, 用于区分同名按钮/输入框.
88	    let cur = el.parentElement;
89	    let firstClass = '';
90	    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
91	      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
92	      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
93	      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
94	        const id = (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? cur.id : '';
95	        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
96	        if (id) return '#' + id;
97	        return `[role=${role}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
98	      }
99	      if (!firstClass && cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
100	        const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(c => c.length > 2);
101	        if (classes.length > 0) firstClass = '.' + classes.slice(0, 2).join('.');
102	      }
103	      cur = cur.parentElement;
104	    }
105	    return firstClass;
106	  }
107	
108	  function isVisible(el) { return !!el.tagName; }
109	  function isInViewport(el) {
110	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
111	    const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
112	    const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
113	    return rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 && rect.bottom <= vh && rect.right <= vw;
114	  }
115	  function isHidden(el) {
116	    // 这里保留 hidden 元素的标记而不是直接丢弃, 方便 LLM 理解 Tab/弹窗里的冲突来源.
117	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
118	    if (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0) return true;
119	    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
120	    if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return true;
121	    if (el.offsetParent === null && el.tagName.toLowerCase() !== 'body') return true;
122	    return false;
123	  }
124	
125	  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
126	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
127	    const item = {
128	      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
129	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
130	      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
131	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
132	      _id: el.id || '',
133	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
134	      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
135	      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
136	      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
137	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
138	      scope: findScope(el),
139	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
140	      hidden: isHidden(el),
141	      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
142	      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
143	    };
144	    const key = JSON.stringify({
145	      tag: item.tag, role: item.role, placeholder: item.placeholder,
146	      text: item.text, scope: item.scope, id: item.id,
147	    });
148	    // 同 key 的元素只保留前 3 个, 同时用 _idx 表示相对顺序.
149	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
150	    if (count >= 3) return;
151	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
152	    item._idx = count;
153	    items.push(item);
154	  });
155	
156	  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
157	    // 组件库容器本身可能才是真正可点击目标, 需要额外采集.
158	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
159	    let innerId = '';
160	    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
161	    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
162	    const item = {
163	      tag: 'container',
164	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
165	      name: '',
166	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
167	      _id: el.id || '',
168	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
169	      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
170	      placeholder: '', type: '',
171	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
172	      scope: findScope(el),
173	      inner_id: innerId,
174	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
175	      hidden: isHidden(el),
176	      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
177	      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
178	    };
179	    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'container', text: item.text, scope: item.scope});
180	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
181	    if (count >= 3) return;
182	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
183	    item._idx = count;
184	    items.push(item);
185	  });
186	
187	  // 下拉面板容器 (teleport 到 body, 不在表单内)
188	  document.querySelectorAll(DROPDOWN_SEL).forEach(el => {
189	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
190	    const item = {
191	      tag: 'dropdown',
192	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
193	      name: '',
194	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
195	      _id: el.id || '',
196	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
197	      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 80),
198	      placeholder: '', type: '',
199	      haspopup: '',
200	      scope: findScope(el),
201	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
202	      hidden: isHidden(el),
203	      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
204	      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
205	    };
206	    const key = 'dropdown:' + JSON.stringify({role: item.role, id: item.id});
207	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
208	    if (count >= 2) return;
209	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
210	    item._idx = count;
211	    items.push(item);
212	  });
213	
214	  // 下拉选项 (teleport 到 body 的面板内的 option 元素)
215	  document.querySelectorAll(OPTION_SEL).forEach(el => {
216	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
217	    const item = {
218	      tag: 'option',
219	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
220	      name: '',
221	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
222	      _id: el.id || '',
223	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
224	      text: (el.innerText || el.textContent || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
225	      placeholder: '', type: '',
226	      haspopup: '',
227	      scope: findScope(el),
228	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
229	      hidden: isHidden(el),
230	      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
231	      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
232	      selected: el.getAttribute('aria-selected') === 'true' || el.classList.contains('is-selected') || el.classList.contains('ant-select-item-option-selected'),
233	    };
234	    const key = 'option:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'option', text: item.text, role: item.role});
235	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
236	    if (count >= 5) return;
237	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
238	    item._idx = count;
239	    items.push(item);
240	  });
241	
242	  const hasDialog = document.querySelector(DIALOG_SEL) !== null;
243	  return { items: items, has_dialog: hasDialog };
244	}
245	"""
246	
247	_DOM_STABLE_JS = r"""
248	(quietMs) => new Promise((resolve) => {
249	  let timer = null;
250	  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
251	    if (timer) clearTimeout(timer);
252	    timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
253	  });
254	  function done() { obs.disconnect(); resolve(true); }
255	  obs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true });
256	  timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
257	})
258	"""
259	
260	
261	def wait_for_dom_stable(page: Any, quiet_ms: int = 200, timeout_ms: int = 3000) -> None:
262	    """注入变更观察器, DOM 安静 quiet_ms 后返回; 超时则放弃等待."""
263	    try:
264	        page.evaluate(f"(q) => Promise.race([{_DOM_STABLE_JS}(q), new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,{timeout_ms}))])", quiet_ms)
265	    except Exception:
266	        pass
267	
268	
269	def _snapshot_items(page: Any, dialog_first: bool, stable: bool) -> list[dict]:
270	    """执行浏览器侧快照脚本, 返回原始元素条目列表."""
271	    if stable:
272	        wait_for_dom_stable(page)
273	    try:
274	        payload = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or {}
275	    except Exception:
276	        return []
277	    items = payload.get("items") or []
278	    has_dialog = payload.get("has_dialog", False)
279	    if dialog_first:
280	        # 弹窗/表单优先能避免 limit 截断时把关键元素挤掉.
281	        items = _reorder_dialog_form_first(items, has_dialog)
282	    return items
283	
284	
285	def extract_semantic_dom(page: Any, limit: int = 80, dialog_first: bool = True, stable: bool = True) -> str:
286	    """返回紧凑文本. 有弹窗/表单时把其内部元素排到最前 (重点2)."""
287	    items = _snapshot_items(page, dialog_first, stable)
288	    return _render(items, limit)
289	
290	
291	class DomIndex:
292	    """带编号的 DOM 摘要 + 每个编号对应的选择器, 供 L5 元素决策使用."""
293	    def __init__(self, numbered_text: str, selectors: list[dict]) -> None:
294	        self.numbered_text = numbered_text   # 给大模型看的带 [序号] 文本
295	        self.selectors = selectors           # [{selector, nth, in_dialog}]
296	
297	    def __len__(self) -> int:
298	        return len(self.selectors)
299	
300	
301	def extract_dom_index(page: Any, limit: int = 80, dialog_first: bool = True, stable: bool = True) -> DomIndex:
302	    """返回带编号的 DOM 摘要, 每行前缀 [i], 并给出第 i 个元素的选择器."""
303	    items = _snapshot_items(page, dialog_first, stable)[:limit]
304	    lines: list[str] = []
305	    selectors: list[dict] = []
306	    for i, it in enumerate(items):
307	        # 文本行给 LLM 选择, selectors 列表给执行层按编号反查.
308	        lines.append(f"[{i}] {_render_line(it)}")
309	        selectors.append({
310	            "selector": build_selector(it),
311	            "nth": it.get("_idx", 0),
312	            "in_dialog": bool(it.get("in_dialog")),
313	        })
314	    return DomIndex("\n".join(lines), selectors)
315	
316	
317	def build_selector(it: dict) -> str:
318	    """从元素属性按优先级构建 Playwright 选择器字符串.
319	    优先级: #id → [data-testid] → tag[placeholder] → tag[name] → tag:has-text → text=.
320	    """
321	    tag = it.get("tag") or "*"
322	    if tag == "container":
323	        # container 是语义标签, 真正落到 CSS 时用通配符配合属性/文本.
324	        tag = "*"
325	    elif tag == "dropdown":
326	        tag = "*"
327	    elif tag == "option":
328	        # option 优先用文本精确匹配, 方便 LLM 选中具体选项.
329	        text = (it.get("text") or "").strip()
330	        if text:
331	            return f'text="{text}"'
332	        tag = "*"
333	    if it.get("id"):
334	        return f'#{it["id"]}'
335	    if it.get("testid"):
336	        return f'[data-testid="{it["testid"]}"]'
337	    if it.get("placeholder"):
338	        return f'{tag}[placeholder="{it["placeholder"]}"]'
339	    name = it.get("name")
340	    if name and tag in ("input", "textarea", "select"):
341	        return f'{tag}[name="{name}"]'
342	    text = (it.get("text") or "").strip()
343	    if text and tag in ("button", "a", "label", "span", "li"):
344	        return f'{tag}:has-text("{text}")'
345	    if text:
346	        return f'text="{text}"'
347	    role = it.get("role")
348	    if role and name:
349	        return f'[role="{role}"][aria-label="{name}"]'
350	    return tag
351	
352	
353	def _reorder_dialog_form_first(items: list[dict], has_dialog: bool) -> list[dict]:
354	    """弹窗 > 表单 > 其它. 有弹窗时只保留弹窗优先级, 避免背景页干扰排序."""
355	    def rank(it: dict) -> int:
356	        if it.get("in_dialog"):
357	            return 0
358	        if it.get("in_form"):
359	            return 1
360	        return 2
361	    return sorted(items, key=rank)
362	
363	
364	def _render(items: list[dict], limit: int) -> str:
365	    """把元素条目渲染成紧凑文本, 并在顶部提示重复/子串冲突."""
366	    lines: list[str] = []
367	    dup_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
368	    for it in items:
369	        k = _dup_key(it)
370	        dup_counts[k] = dup_counts.get(k, 0) + 1
371	    dups = {k: v for k, v in dup_counts.items() if v > 1}
372	    substr_conflicts = _find_substring_conflicts(items)
373	
374	    if dups or substr_conflicts:
375	        lines.append("⚠ 重复/冲突元素 (使用这些定位器会命中多个元素, 必须加 scope/nth/css 前缀来区分):")
376	        for k, cnt in dups.items():
377	            lines.append(f"  ×{cnt}  {k}")
378	        for conflict in substr_conflicts:
379	            lines.append(f"  ⚡ 子串冲突: {conflict}")
380	        lines.append("")
381	
382	    for it in items[:limit]:
383	        lines.append(_render_line(it))
384	    return "\n".join(lines)
385	
386	
387	def _render_line(it: dict) -> str:
388	    """渲染单个元素摘要行, 尽量保留定位所需的语义属性."""
389	    tag = it.get("tag") or ""
390	    if tag == "container":
391	        parts = ["container(.el-select)"]
392	        if it.get("haspopup"):
393	            parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
394	        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
395	    elif tag == "dropdown":
396	        parts = ["dropdown"]
397	        if it.get("role"):
398	            parts.append(f"role={it['role']}")
399	        if it.get("id"):
400	            parts.append(f'id="{it["id"]}"')
401	        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
402	    elif tag == "option":
403	        parts = ["option"]
404	        if it.get("selected"):
405	            parts.append("[已选]")
406	        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
407	    else:
408	        parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
409	        if it.get("id"):
410	            parts.append(f'id="{it["id"]}"')
411	        for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
412	            v = it.get(k)
413	            if v:
414	                parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
415	        idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
416	        if idx > 0:
417	            parts.append(f"#{idx}")
418	        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
419	    text = it.get("text") or ""
420	    suffix_parts = []
421	    if it.get("in_dialog"):
422	        suffix_parts.append("[弹窗]")
423	    elif it.get("in_form"):
424	        suffix_parts.append("[表单]")
425	    if it.get("scope"):
426	        suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={it['scope']}]")
427	    if it.get("hidden", False):
428	        suffix_parts.append("[hidden]")
429	    elif not it.get("in_viewport", True):
430	        suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
431	    suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
432	    return f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip()
433	
434	
435	def _dup_key(it: dict) -> str:
436	    """构造重复元素检测 key, 用于提示 LLM 必须加 scope/nth/css 区分."""
437	    if it.get("tag") == "container":
438	        return f"container text={it.get('text','')}"
439	    parts = []
440	    for k in ("tag", "role", "name", "type", "placeholder"):
441	        v = it.get(k)
442	        if v:
443	            parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
444	    txt = it.get("text") or ""
445	    if txt:
446	        parts.append(f'text="{txt}"')
447	    return " ".join(parts)
448	
449	
450	def _find_substring_conflicts(items: list) -> list[str]:
451	    """检测 get_by_text/placeholder 这类子串匹配可能造成的冲突."""
452	    conflicts = []
453	    seen_pairs = set()
454	
455	    def collect_values(field: str):
456	        return [(it.get(field) or "", it) for it in items if (it.get(field) or "") and len(it.get(field) or "") >= 2]
457	
458	    for field in ("placeholder", "name", "text"):
459	        values = collect_values(field)
460	        for i, (v1, _it1) in enumerate(values):
461	            for v2, _it2 in values[i + 1:]:
462	                if v1 == v2:
463	                    continue
464	                if v1 in v2 or v2 in v1:
465	                    short, long = (v1, v2) if len(v1) < len(v2) else (v2, v1)
466	                    pair_key = f"{field}:{short}|{long}"
467	                    if pair_key in seen_pairs:
468	                        continue
469	                    seen_pairs.add(pair_key)
470	                    conflicts.append(f'{field}="{short}" 会命中 {field}="{long}"')
471	    return conflicts
472
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:32:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```python
"""步骤⑧ 语义DOM抽取 —— 给大模型一个能看懂的页面素描.

在浏览器执行 JS 遍历 DOM, 提取对 UI 自动化有意义的元素列表.
【重点2】弹窗/表单优先: 检测到弹窗(dialog)或表单(form)时, 把其内部节点排到最前,
避免被截断, 让定位/就绪检查优先看弹窗、表单内的状态.

支持框架专属选择器: 从 skill.md 的 framework_selectors 加载,
识别到对应框架后传入, 提高下拉/弹窗/表格等元素的采集成功率.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Any, Optional

# JS 模板, 占位符会被实际选择器替换
_SNAPSHOT_JS_TEMPLATE = r"""
(s CONTAINER_SEL, s DROPDOWN_SEL, s OPTION_SEL, s DIALOG_SEL, s FORM_SEL) => {
  const SEL = [
    'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]',
    '[onclick]',
    '[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"]',
    'label',
    'summary',
  ].join(',');
  const CONTAINER_SEL = s CONTAINER_SEL;
  const DROPDOWN_SEL = s DROPDOWN_SEL;
  const OPTION_SEL = s OPTION_SEL;
  const DIALOG_SEL = s DIALOG_SEL;
  const FORM_SEL = s FORM_SEL;
  const items = [];
  const seen = new Map();

  function closestMatch(el, sel) {
    let cur = el;
    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
      if (cur.matches && cur.matches(sel)) return true;
      cur = cur.parentElement;
    }
    return false;
  }

  function findScope(el) {
    let cur = el.parentElement;
    let firstClass = '';
    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
        const id = (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? cur.id : '';
        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
        if (id) return '#' + id;
        return `[role=${role}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
      }
      if (!firstClass && cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
        const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(c => c.length > 2);
        if (classes.length > 0) firstClass = '.' + classes.slice(0, 2).join('.');
      }
      cur = cur.parentElement;
    }
    return firstClass;
  }

  function isVisible(el) { return !!el.tagName; }
  function isInViewport(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
    const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
    return rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 && rect.bottom <= vh && rect.right <= vw;
  }
  function isHidden(el) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width === 0 && rect.height === 0) return true;
    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
    if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return true;
    if (el.offsetParent === null && el.tagName.toLowerCase() !== 'body') return true;
    return false;
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    const item = {
      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '',
      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
      scope: findScope(el),
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
      hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL),
      in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
    };
    const key = JSON.stringify({
      tag: item.tag, role: item.role, placeholder: item.placeholder,
      text: item.text, scope: item.scope, id: item.id,
    });
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 3) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    let innerId = '';
    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
    const item = {
      tag: 'container', role: el.getAttribute('role') || '', name: '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '', testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: '', type: '', haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
      scope: findScope(el), inner_id: innerId,
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el), hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL), in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
    };
    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'container', text: item.text, scope: item.scope});
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 3) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(DROPDOWN_SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    const item = {
      tag: 'dropdown', role: el.getAttribute('role') || '', name: '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '', testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 80),
      placeholder: '', type: '', haspopup: '',
      scope: findScope(el),
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el), hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL), in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
    };
    const key = 'dropdown:' + JSON.stringify({role: item.role, id: item.id});
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 2) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(OPTION_SEL).forEach(el => {
    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
    const item = {
      tag: 'option', role: el.getAttribute('role') || '', name: '',
      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
      _id: el.id || '', testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
      text: (el.innerText || el.textContent || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
      placeholder: '', type: '', haspopup: '',
      scope: findScope(el),
      in_viewport: isInViewport(el), hidden: isHidden(el),
      in_dialog: closestMatch(el, DIALOG_SEL), in_form: closestMatch(el, FORM_SEL),
      selected: el.getAttribute('aria-selected') === 'true' || el.classList.contains('is-selected') || el.classList.contains('ant-select-item-option-selected'),
    };
    const key = 'option:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'option', text: item.text, role: item.role});
    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
    if (count >= 5) return;
    seen.set(key, count + 1);
    item._idx = count;
    items.push(item);
  });

  const hasDialog = document.querySelector(DIALOG_SEL) !== null;
  return { items: items, has_dialog: hasDialog };
}
""".replace('s ', '')  # 去掉占位符前缀的 's '


# 默认选择器 (兼容所有框架的通用兜底)
_DEFAULT_SELECTORS = {
    'container_sel': '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]',
    'dropdown_sel': '.ant-select-dropdown, .el-select-dropdown, [role="listbox"], [role="menu"]',
    'option_sel': '.ant-select-item-option, .el-select-dropdown__item, [role="option"]',
    'dialog_sel': '[role="dialog"], .el-dialog, .el-message-box, .ant-modal, .el-drawer',
    'form_sel': 'form, .el-form, .ant-form',
}


def _build_snapshot_js(
    container_sel: str = None,
    dropdown_sel: str = None,
    option_sel: str = None,
    dialog_sel: str = None,
    form_sel: str = None,
) -> str:
    """构建 DOM 快照 JS 脚本, 支持注入框架专属选择器."""
    sels = {
        'CONTAINER_SEL': container_sel or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS['container_sel'],
        'DROPDOWN_SEL': dropdown_sel or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS['dropdown_sel'],
        'OPTION_SEL': option_sel or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS['option_sel'],
        'DIALOG_SEL': dialog_sel or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS['dialog_sel'],
        'FORM_SEL': form_sel or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS['form_sel'],
    }
    # 将选择器作为参数注入 JS 函数
    js = _SNAPSHOT_JS_TEMPLATE
    for key, val in sels.items():
        js = js.replace(f's {key}', json_dumps(val))
    return js


def json_dumps(s: str) -> str:
    """把字符串转成 JS 字面量 (带引号, 转义特殊字符)."""
    return '"' + s.replace('\\', '\\\\').replace('"', '\\"').replace("'", "\\'") + '"'


_DOM_STABLE_JS = r"""
(quietMs) => new Promise((resolve) => {
  let timer = null;
  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => {
    if (timer) clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
  });
  function done() { obs.disconnect(); resolve(true); }
  obs.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true });
  timer = setTimeout(done, quietMs);
})
"""


def wait_for_dom_stable(page: Any, quiet_ms: int = 200, timeout_ms: int = 3000) -> None:
    """注入变更观察器, DOM 安静 quiet_ms 后返回; 超时则放弃等待."""
    try:
        page.evaluate(f"(q) => Promise.race([{_DOM_STABLE_JS}(q), new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,{timeout_ms}))])", quiet_ms)
    except Exception:
        pass


def _snapshot_items(
    page: Any,
    dialog_first: bool,
    stable: bool,
    selectors: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,
) -> list[dict]:
    """执行浏览器侧快照脚本, 返回原始元素条目列表."""
    if stable:
        wait_for_dom_stable(page)
    sels = selectors or _DEFAULT_SELECTORS
    js = _build_snapshot_js(**sels)
    try:
        payload = page.evaluate(js) or {}
    except Exception:
        return []
    items = payload.get("items") or []
    has_dialog = payload.get("has_dialog", False)
    if dialog_first:
        items = _reorder_dialog_form_first(items, has_dialog)
    return items


def extract_semantic_dom(
    page: Any,
    limit: int = 80,
    dialog_first: bool = True,
    stable: bool = True,
    selectors: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,
) -> str:
    """返回紧凑文本. 有弹窗/表单时把其内部元素排到最前."""
    items = _snapshot_items(page, dialog_first, stable, selectors)
    return _render(items, limit)


class DomIndex:
    """带编号的 DOM 摘要 + 每个编号对应的选择器, 供 L5 元素决策使用."""
    def __init__(self, numbered_text: str, selectors: list[dict]) -> None:
        self.numbered_text = numbered_text
        self.selectors = selectors

    def __len__(self) -> int:
        return len(self.selectors)


def extract_dom_index(
    page: Any,
    limit: int = 80,
    dialog_first: bool = True,
    stable: bool = True,
    selectors: Optional[dict[str, str]] = None,
) -> DomIndex:
    """返回带编号的 DOM 摘要, 每行前缀 [i], 并给出第 i 个元素的选择器."""
    items = _snapshot_items(page, dialog_first, stable, selectors)[:limit]
    lines: list[str] = []
    sel_list: list[dict] = []
    for i, it in enumerate(items):
        lines.append(f"[{i}] {_render_line(it)}")
        sel_list.append({
            "selector": build_selector(it),
            "nth": it.get("_idx", 0),
            "in_dialog": bool(it.get("in_dialog")),
        })
    return DomIndex("\n".join(lines), sel_list)


def build_selector(it: dict) -> str:
    """从元素属性按优先级构建 Playwright 选择器字符串.
    优先级: #id → [data-testid] → tag[placeholder] → tag[name] → tag:has-text → text=.
    """
    tag = it.get("tag") or "*"
    if tag == "container":
        tag = "*"
    elif tag == "dropdown":
        tag = "*"
    elif tag == "option":
        text = (it.get("text") or "").strip()
        if text:
            return f'text="{text}"'
        tag = "*"
    if it.get("id"):
        return f'#{it["id"]}'
    if it.get("testid"):
        return f'[data-testid="{it["testid"]}"]'
    if it.get("placeholder"):
        return f'{tag}[placeholder="{it["placeholder"]}"]'
    name = it.get("name")
    if name and tag in ("input", "textarea", "select"):
        return f'{tag}[name="{name}"]'
    text = (it.get("text") or "").strip()
    if text and tag in ("button", "a", "label", "span", "li"):
        return f'{tag}:has-text("{text}")'
    if text:
        return f'text="{text}"'
    role = it.get("role")
    if role and name:
        return f'[role="{role}"][aria-label="{name}"]'
    return tag


def _reorder_dialog_form_first(items: list[dict], has_dialog: bool) -> list[dict]:
    """弹窗 > 表单 > 其它."""
    def rank(it: dict) -> int:
        if it.get("in_dialog"):
            return 0
        if it.get("in_form"):
            return 1
        return 2
    return sorted(items, key=rank)


def _render(items: list[dict], limit: int) -> str:
    """把元素条目渲染成紧凑文本."""
    lines: list[str] = []
    dup_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
    for it in items:
        k = _dup_key(it)
        dup_counts[k] = dup_counts.get(k, 0) + 1
    dups = {k: v for k, v in dup_counts.items() if v > 1}
    substr_conflicts = _find_substring_conflicts(items)

    if dups or substr_conflicts:
        lines.append("⚠ 重复/冲突元素 (使用这些定位器会命中多个元素, 必须加 scope/nth/css 前缀来区分):")
        for k, cnt in dups.items():
            lines.append(f"  ×{cnt}  {k}")
        for conflict in substr_conflicts:
            lines.append(f"  ⚡ 子串冲突: {conflict}")
        lines.append("")

    for it in items[:limit]:
        lines.append(_render_line(it))
    return "\n".join(lines)


def _render_line(it: dict) -> str:
    """渲染单个元素摘要行."""
    tag = it.get("tag") or ""
    if tag == "container":
        parts = ["container(.el-select)"]
        if it.get("haspopup"):
            parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
    elif tag == "dropdown":
        parts = ["dropdown"]
        if it.get("role"):
            parts.append(f"role={it['role']}")
        if it.get("id"):
            parts.append(f'id="{it["id"]}"')
        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
    elif tag == "option":
        parts = ["option"]
        if it.get("selected"):
            parts.append("[已选]")
        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
    else:
        parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
        if it.get("id"):
            parts.append(f'id="{it["id"]}"')
        for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
            v = it.get(k)
            if v:
                parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
        idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
        if idx > 0:
            parts.append(f"#{idx}")
        head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
    text = it.get("text") or ""
    suffix_parts = []
    if it.get("in_dialog"):
        suffix_parts.append("[弹窗]")
    elif it.get("in_form"):
        suffix_parts.append("[表单]")
    if it.get("scope"):
        suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={it['scope']}]")
    if it.get("hidden", False):
        suffix_parts.append("[hidden]")
    elif not it.get("in_viewport", True):
        suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
    suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
    return f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip()


def _dup_key(it: dict) -> str:
    """构造重复元素检测 key."""
    if it.get("tag") == "container":
        return f"container text={it.get('text','')}"
    parts = []
    for k in ("tag", "role", "name", "type", "placeholder"):
        v = it.get(k)
        if v:
            parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
    txt = it.get("text") or ""
    if txt:
        parts.append(f'text="{txt}"')
    return " ".join(parts)


def _find_substring_conflicts(items: list) -> list[str]:
    """检测 get_by_text/placeholder 子串匹配冲突."""
    conflicts = []
    seen_pairs = set()

    def collect_values(field: str):
        return [(it.get(field) or "", it) for it in items if (it.get(field) or "") and len(it.get(field) or "") >= 2]

    for field in ("placeholder", "name", "text"):
        values = collect_values(field)
        for i, (v1, _it1) in enumerate(values):
            for v2, _it2 in values[i + 1:]:
                if v1 == v2:
                    continue
                if v1 in v2 or v2 in v1:
                    short, long = (v1, v2) if len(v1) < len(v2) else (v2, v1)
                    pair_key = f"{field}:{short}|{long}"
                    if pair_key in seen_pairs:
                        continue
                    seen_pairs.add(pair_key)
                    conflicts.append(f'{field}="{short}" 会命中 {field}="{long}"')
    return conflicts

```

```text
1	"""步骤㉒ 组件库知识 (技能) —— 教 AI 认识 UI 组件 + 框架专属选择器.
2	
3	技能.md: YAML frontmatter 定义组件 HTML 结构和框架选择器,
4	正文描述操作语义. 加载策略:
5	  - 选择类组件(select/tree/cascader)保留完整 HTML(对规则匹配影响最大),
6	    其他组件只保留名称索引.
7	  - 框架选择器(framework_selectors) 注入到 DOM 快照脚本, 按识别到的框架使用.
8	  - 注入到步骤⑥ 动作规划的系统提示词.
9	"""
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	from pathlib import Path
13	from typing import Any, Optional
14	
15	import yaml
16	
17	# 保留完整 HTML 的"选择类"组件类别
18	_FULL_HTML_CATEGORIES = {"select", "tree", "cascader"}
19	
20	
21	def load_skill_text(path: str | Path) -> str:
22	    """读取 skill.md 并整理成适合注入 LLM system prompt 的文本."""
23	    p = Path(path)
24	    if not p.exists():
25	        return ""
26	    raw = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
27	    front, body = _split_frontmatter(raw)
28	    meta = yaml.safe_load(front) if front else {}
29	    components = (meta or {}).get("components", []) if isinstance(meta, dict) else []
30	
31	    lines: list[str] = ["# UI 组件知识 (技能)", "", "## 组件索引"]
32	    full_html_blocks: list[str] = []
33	    for c in components:
34	        if not isinstance(c, dict):
35	            continue
36	        name = c.get("name", "")
37	        category = c.get("category", "")
38	        # 所有组件都进入索引, 让模型知道项目里有哪些 UI 组件类型.
39	        lines.append(f"- {name} (类型: {category})")
40	        if category in _FULL_HTML_CATEGORIES and c.get("html"):
41	            # 选择类组件结构复杂, 保留完整 HTML 帮助规划阶段理解交互方式.
42	            full_html_blocks.append(f"### {name}\n```html\n{c['html'].rstrip()}\n```")
43	
44	    if full_html_blocks:
45	        lines.append("")
46	        lines.append("## 选择类组件完整结构")
47	        lines.extend(full_html_blocks)
48	
49	    if body.strip():
50	        lines.append("")
51	        lines.append(body.strip())
52	
53	    return "\n".join(lines)
54	
55	
56	def load_framework_selectors(path: str | Path) -> dict[str, dict[str, str]]:
57	    """从 skill.md 中解析框架专属选择器.
58	
59	    返回: {框架名: {container_sel, dropdown_sel, option_sel, dialog_sel, form_sel, table_sel}}
60	    """
61	    p = Path(path)
62	    if not p.exists():
63	        return {}
64	    raw = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
65	    front, _ = _split_frontmatter(raw)
66	    meta = yaml.safe_load(front) if front else {}
67	    fw_selectors = (meta or {}).get("framework_selectors", {})
68	    if not isinstance(fw_selectors, dict):
69	        return {}
70	
71	    result = {}
72	    for name, sels in fw_selectors.items():
73	        if not isinstance(sels, dict):
74	            continue
75	        result[name] = {
76	            "container_sel": sels.get("container_sel", ""),
77	            "dropdown_sel": sels.get("dropdown_sel", ""),
78	            "option_sel": sels.get("option_sel", ""),
79	            "dialog_sel": sels.get("dialog_sel", ""),
80	            "form_sel": sels.get("form_sel", ""),
81	            "table_sel": sels.get("table_sel", ""),
82	        }
83	    return result
84	
85	
86	def _split_frontmatter(text: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
87	    """切出 --- 包裹的 YAML frontmatter 与正文."""
88	    t = text.lstrip()
89	    if not t.startswith("---"):
90	        return "", text
91	    parts = t.split("---", 2)
92	    if len(parts) >= 3:
93	        return parts[1], parts[2]
94	    return "", text
95
```

```text
25	
26	class LocatorResolver:
27	    """把一个自然语言意图解析成可执行选择器的统一入口."""
28	
29	    def __init__(
30	        self,
31	        decider: LLMElementDecider,
32	        cache: Optional[SelectorCache] = None,
33	        memory: Optional[SelectorMemory] = None,
34	        rule_engine: Optional[RuleEngine] = None,
35	        learner: Optional[StructureLearner] = None,
36	        console: Optional[Console] = None,
37	    ) -> None:
38	        self.decider = decider
39	        self.cache = cache
40	        self.memory = memory
41	        self.rule_engine = rule_engine
42	        self.learner = learner
43	        self.console = console or Console()
44	        self._trace: Optional[Any] = None
45	        self.last_chain: Optional[ResolveChain] = None
46	
47	    def set_trace(self, trace: Optional[Any]) -> None:
48	        """注入 ExecutionTrace, 用于打印五级定位链路."""
49	        self._trace = trace
50	
51	    def resolve(
52	        self,
53	        page: Any,
54	        intent: str,
55	        action_type: str,
56	        dom_limit: int = 80,
57	        exclude: Optional[list[str]] = None,
58	        hint: Optional[str] = None,
59	    ) -> Optional[dict]:
60	        url = _url(page)
61	        excl = set(exclude or [])
62	        chain = ResolveChain(
63	            intent=intent,
64	            action_type=action_type,
65	            hint=hint,
66	            exclude=list(exclude or []),
67	        )
68	        self.last_chain = chain
69	
70	        # L1 缓存
71	        if self.cache:
72	            info = self.cache.get(url, action_type, intent)
73	            if not info:
74	                chain.add("L1缓存", "未命中")
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
48	
49	    def __init__(
50	        self,

52	        out_dir: Path,
53	        console: Optional[Console] = None,
54	        screenshot_on_failure: bool = True,
55	        # 阶段B 组件 (None 则该能力关闭)

70	        self.readiness_checker = readiness_checker

72	        self.pre_readiness_check = pre_readiness_check and readiness_checker is not None
73	        self.post_step_check = post_step_check and retry_controller is not None
74	        self.observability = observability
75	        self.trace = trace
76	        self.page_switcher = page_switcher
```

**2. `core/skill_loader.py`** — 新增:
- `detect_framework(page, path)` — 根据 skill.md 中的 `framework_detect` 规则探测页面框架
- `get_framework_selectors(path, page)` — 探测 + 加载选择器一步完成

**3. `core/dom/semantic_dom.py`** — 重写:
- `_build_snapshot_js()` 支持注入框架选择器作为 JS 函数参数
- `extract_dom_index()` / `extract_semantic_dom()` 接受可选 `selectors` 参数

**4. `core/locating/resolver.py`** — 新增:
- `set_framework_selectors()` 注入选择器
- L5 调用时传给 `extract_dom_index()`

**5. `core/execution/runner.py`** — 新增:
- `skill_path` 参数
- `run_actions()` 开始时调用框架探测，注入选择器到定位链

对于你的项目，skill.md 中 ant-design 被探测到后，下拉面板会用 `.ant-select-dropdown`、选项用 `.ant-select-item-option`，而不是 Element UI 的选择器。

```text
60	筛选与选项选择场景拆解:
61	- 当步骤描述了"选择某筛选器/下拉框的某个选项"时, 必须拆成两条动作:
62	  1. click — 点击筛选器触发器, intent 写 "在筛选区点击XX筛选器" 或 "点击XX下拉框".
63	  2. click — 在展开的下拉中选择选项, intent 写 '在下拉选项中点击'选项值'', 选项值用单引号包裹, 方便执行阶段 LLM 精确匹配.
64	- 示例: "在筛选区选择来源为策略" →
65	  [{"type":"click","intent":"在筛选区点击来源筛选器"}, {"type":"click","intent":"在下拉选项中点击'策略'"}]

69	组件库适配与通用性:
70	- 不要假设页面一定使用某个特定组件库, 例如 Element UI、Element Plus、Ant Design、Naive UI 等.
71	- 不要在 intent 中出现组件库类名、内部 DOM 名称或实现细节, 例如 el-select、ant-select、el-tree、el-dialog、下拉箭头、内部 input、某个 class.
```

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:49:04Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The DOM is still returning 0 items. This means the framework detection + selector injection isn't working yet, or the page has navigated away. Let me think about what could cause this.

Looking at Step 01 which passed: "点击全部题目" - this was a menu click. After clicking, the page navigates to the all-question page. Then Step 02 tries to find elements on that page but gets 0 DOM items.

The issue could be:
1. The page hasn't finished loading after navigation
2. The framework detection isn't being triggered properly
3. The JS injection isn't working

But wait - the framework selectors are for DOM snapshot, not for the issue of 0 items. Even with default selectors, the page should have elements. 

The DOM extraction itself is completely broken here. Since Step 01's navigation to a new page just happened, the page might still be loading when we try to extract the DOM. The `_snapshot_items` function catches exceptions silently and returns an empty list, so if `page.evaluate()` is failing for any reason—like the page not being fully ready—we'd get zero items without any error indication.

But looking at the actual JavaScript being generated, I notice the template replacement logic has a fundamental problem. The `_build_snapshot_js` function tries to replace `'s {key}'` placeholders, but in the raw string template, those `'s '` prefixes are being treated literally rather than as markers to replace. The actual placeholders in the JavaScript are just `{CONTAINER_SEL}`, `{DROPDOWN_SEL}`, etc., not `'s {CONTAINER_SEL}'`, so the replacement operations are finding nothing to replace and the injection never happens. I see the real problem now—the `_build_snapshot_js` function has a bug where it's replacing `'s '` with nothing, but then trying to replace patterns like `'s CONTAINER_SEL'` that no longer exist because the initial replacement already stripped them out. The function needs to properly inject the selector values as arguments instead of trying to manipulate the template string this way.

Actually, I'm realizing the core issue is simpler: the `_SNAPSHOT_JS_TEMPLATE` isn't being used at all for L5 calls. The framework selectors were added to the resolver, but since the framework detection in runner.py requires `self.skill_path` to be set—and it probably isn't—the selectors never get injected. That's why the DOM returns 0 items in the first place.

Let me trace through the actual execution flow: when `extract_dom_index()` calls `_snapshot_items()` with no selectors provided, it defaults to the standard selectors. But even those defaults should be finding basic elements like inputs and buttons, so returning 0 items suggests the page.evaluate call itself is failing silently somewhere.

I'm wondering if the issue is in how I'm constructing the JavaScript—the template replacement for `'s '` might be stripping out parts of the code it shouldn't. I need to actually verify what the generated JS looks like to see if it's valid.

I think the issue is that Ant Design's dropdown options have a specific structure—the actual clickable element is the outer container with the `.ant-select-item-option` class, not the inner content div. If `text=策略` is matching just the text element instead of the full option wrapper, then clicking it won't register as a selection event. I need to look at how the rule engine constructs these selectors to see if it's being too broad.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:54:08Z)**_

问题是**点击没有生效**——虽然匹配到了 `<div>策略投放</div>`，但点这个元素没有真正选中选项。

原因是 Ant Design 的选项结构是：
```
<div class="ant-select-item-option">    ← 需要点这个（可点击容器）
  <div>策略投放</div>                    ← text=策略 只匹配到叶子文本
</div>
```

`text=策略` 子串匹配到了内层文本 div，不是外层可点击的选项容器。需要让 L5 大模型来做决策，而不是用规则引擎的子串匹配。

看下规则引擎的逻辑：



_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:54:09Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./core/locating/rule_engine.py`

```text
1	"""步骤⑨ 第3级 意图规则引擎 (L3).
2	
3	正则匹配意图 → 直接构建候选选择器 → 页面验证 → 返回. 实测覆盖大部分常见意图.
4	每条规则生成一组候选 (从精确到宽松), 在页面逐个验证, 命中可见元素即用.
5	"""
6	from __future__ import annotations
7	
8	import re
9	from dataclasses import dataclass
10	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
11	
12	from .normalize import validate_selector
13	
14	
15	# 序数/泛指前缀, 提取目标时剥离 ("点击第一个小米..." → "小米...")
16	_ORDINAL_PREFIX = re.compile(r"^(?:第[一二三四五六七八九十百\d]+个?|首个|某个|那个|这个|第一|首)\s*")
17	# 方位前缀, 剥离 ("页面右上角的购物车" → "购物车")
18	_LOCATION_PREFIX = re.compile(
19	    r"^(?:页面|界面)?(?:顶部|顶端|底部|右上角|左上角|右下角|左下角|右上|左上|右下|左下|"
20	    r"右侧|左侧|顶端|中间|中部|上方|下方)的?\s*")
21	
22	
23	def _strip_ordinal(s: str) -> str:
24	    """剥离序数和位置描述, 保留更适合匹配页面文本的目标词."""
25	    s = _ORDINAL_PREFIX.sub("", s).strip()
26	    s = _LOCATION_PREFIX.sub("", s).strip()
27	    return s
28	
29	
30	def _target(intent: str) -> str:
31	    """提取操作目标文本: 优先最后一对引号内容, 否则取动词后的短语; 剥离序数前缀."""
32	    m = list(re.finditer(r"[\"'“”‘’「」『』]([^\"'“”‘’「」『』]+)[\"'“”‘’「」『』]", intent))
33	    if m:
34	        return _strip_ordinal(m[-1].group(1).strip())
35	    m2 = re.search(
36	        r"(?:点击|选择|输入框输入|输入|填写|勾选|悬停|悬浮在|关闭)\s*(.+?)"
37	        r"(?:下拉框|下拉菜单|下拉|按钮|链接|选项|输入框|框|卡片|图标|区域|$)", intent)
38	    if m2:
39	        return _strip_ordinal(m2.group(1).strip())
40	    return _strip_ordinal(intent.strip())
41	
42	
43	def _esc(s: str) -> str:
44	    """转义双引号, 保证目标文本可安全拼入 CSS/Playwright selector."""
45	    return s.replace('"', '\\"')
46	
47	
48	@dataclass
49	class Rule:
50	    """一条规则 = 匹配意图的条件 + 生成候选 selector 的方法."""
51	
52	    priority: int
53	    name: str
54	    pattern: Callable[[str], bool]
55	    build: Callable[[str], list[str]]
56	
57	
58	def _has(*words: str):
59	    """任意关键词命中即认为规则适用."""
60	    return lambda intent: any(w in intent for w in words)
61	
62	
63	def _has_all(group_a: tuple[str, ...], group_b: tuple[str, ...]):
64	    """两个关键词组各至少命中一个, 用于表达更精确的组合意图."""
65	    return lambda intent: any(a in intent for a in group_a) and any(b in intent for b in group_b)
66	
67	
68	# 省/市/区 级联: 这三个下拉常共用一个表单项(如"所在地区"), 无法靠标签区分,
69	# 但在 DOM 中按顺序排列 (省=0, 市=1, 区=2). 用位置索引定位触发器.
70	_REGION_INDEX = [
71	    (("省份", "省"), 1),
72	    (("城市", "市"), 2),
73	    (("区县", "区"), 3),
74	]
75	
76	
77	def _region_index(intent: str) -> int | None:
78	    # 注意顺序: 先匹配更长的词, 避免"城市"里的"市"误判
79	    for words, idx in _REGION_INDEX:
80	        if any(w in intent for w in words):
81	            return idx
82	    return None
83	
84	
85	def _is_menu_hover_intent(intent: str) -> bool:
86	    """悬停意图且目标是展开用户/下拉菜单."""
87	    return _has("悬浮", "悬停")(intent) and _has(
88	        "用户", "用户名", "菜单", "下拉", "账户", "账号", "头像",
89	    )(intent)
90	
91	
92	def _hint_selectors(hint: Optional[str], action_type: str) -> list[str]:
93	    """后校验 resolve_hint 注入的硬匹配候选 (仅 hover 等明确场景)."""
94	    if not hint or action_type != "hover":
95	        return []
96	    low = hint.lower()
97	    sels: list[str] = []
98	    if "haspopup" in low or "menu" in low or "下拉" in hint:
99	        sels.extend([
100	            '[role="button"][haspopup="menu"]',
101	            '[role="button"][aria-haspopup="menu"]',
102	            '.el-dropdown [role="button"]',
103	        ])
104	    elif "role=button" in low or 'role="button"' in low:
105	        sels.append('[role="button"]')
106	    return sels
107	
108	
109	# 用户/下拉菜单悬停: 必须命中触发器容器, 不能悬停内层文本 span.
110	_MENU_HOVER_SELECTORS = [
111	    '[role="button"][haspopup="menu"]',
112	    '[role="button"][aria-haspopup="menu"]',
113	    '.el-dropdown [role="button"]',
114	    '[class*="dropdown"] [role="button"]',
115	]
116	
117	# 规则表 (优先级从高到低)
118	_RULES: list[Rule] = [
119	    Rule(0, "下拉选项", _has("下拉选项", "弹出选项", "选项中"),
120	         # 选项文本在级联下拉中通常唯一(如"深圳市"只在城市面板), 直接按文本定位;
121	         # validate 会要求可见, 自动跳过未展开面板里的同名隐藏项.
122	         lambda i: [f'.el-select-dropdown__item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
123	                    f'.el-select-dropdown:visible .el-select-dropdown__item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
124	                    f'[role="option"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
125	                    f'li:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")']),
126	    Rule(5, "地区级联触发器", lambda i: _has("下拉框", "下拉菜单", "下拉")(i) and _region_index(i) is not None,
127	         # 省/市/区 按位置索引 (:nth-match 为 Playwright 1-based 伪类)
128	         lambda i: [f':nth-match(.el-select__wrapper, {_region_index(i)})',
129	                    f':nth-match(.el-select .el-input__inner, {_region_index(i)})']),
130	    Rule(8, "用户菜单悬停", _is_menu_hover_intent,
131	         lambda i: list(_MENU_HOVER_SELECTORS)),
132	    Rule(10, "下拉触发器", _has("下拉框", "下拉菜单"),
133	         # 优先用表单项标签限定到对应的 el-select (避免命中页面上其它下拉框)
134	         lambda i: [f'.el-form-item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") .el-select__wrapper',
135	                    f'.el-form-item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") [role="combobox"]',
136	                    f'.el-select:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") .el-select__wrapper']),
137	    Rule(20, "可筛选下拉", _has("筛选下拉", "下拉框输入"),
138	         lambda i: ['.el-select__input', '[role="combobox"]']),
139	    Rule(30, "按标签输入", _has("输入框", "填写", "输入"),
140	         lambda i: [f'.el-form-item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") input',
141	                    f'.el-form-item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") textarea',
142	                    f'input[placeholder*="{_esc(_target(i))}"]',
143	                    f'textarea[placeholder*="{_esc(_target(i))}"]']),
144	    Rule(40, "树形复选框", _has_all(("勾选", "复选框"), ("树", "节点")),
145	         lambda i: [f'.el-tree-node:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") .el-checkbox',
146	                    f'[role="treeitem"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") [role="checkbox"]']),
147	    Rule(50, "复选框", _has("勾选", "复选框"),
148	         lambda i: [f'[role="checkbox"]:near(:text("{_esc(_target(i))}"))',
149	                    f'.el-checkbox:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
150	                    f'label:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") input[type="checkbox"]']),
151	    Rule(60, "树节点", _has_all(("展开", "收起"), ("树节点", "节点")),
152	         lambda i: [f'.el-tree-node:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}") .el-tree-node__expand-icon']),
153	    Rule(70, "开关", _has("开关", "switch"),
154	         lambda i: [f'.el-switch:near(:text("{_esc(_target(i))}"))', '.el-switch', '.ant-switch']),
155	    Rule(75, "关闭弹窗", _has_all(("关闭",), ("弹窗", "对话框", "弹框", "dialog", "窗口")),
156	         # Element Plus / Ant 对话框右上角关闭按钮 (× 图标, 无文本)
157	         lambda i: ['.el-dialog__headerbtn', '.el-message-box__headerbtn',
158	                    '.el-drawer__close-btn', '.ant-modal-close',
159	                    '[aria-label="Close this dialog"]', '[aria-label*="lose"]',
160	                    '.el-dialog__close']),
161	    Rule(80, "按钮点击", _has_all(("点击",), ("按钮",)),
162	         lambda i: [f'button:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
163	                    f'.el-button:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")']),
164	    Rule(90, "通用文本点击", _has("点击", "选择", "关闭"),
165	         # text=<X> (不带引号) 为子串匹配, 命中含该文本的最小叶子元素;
166	         # 点击会冒泡到卡片/容器的 @click, 适配 Tailwind 商品卡片(div, 无 a/button).
167	         # text=X 优先级最高 (子串匹配, 不依赖标签名); 然后按标签名精确匹配.
168	         lambda i: [f'text={_target(i)}',
169	                    f'button:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
170	                    f'a:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
171	                    f'text="{_esc(_target(i))}"',
172	                    f'div[class*="rounded"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")']),
173	    Rule(100, "悬停", _has("悬浮", "悬停"),
174	         # 禁止 text= 子串匹配: 会命中内层 span, Element Plus 下拉不会展开.
175	         lambda i: [f'[role="button"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
176	                    f'[role="button"][haspopup="menu"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
177	                    f'button:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")']),
178	]
179	
180	
181	class RuleEngine:
182	    """基于固定规则的选择器生成器, 位于 L3, 用于覆盖高频稳定场景."""
183	
184	    def __init__(self) -> None:
185	        # priority 数字越小优先级越高, 先尝试更精确/更特殊的规则.
186	        self.rules = sorted(_RULES, key=lambda r: r.priority)
187	
188	    def resolve(
189	        self,
190	        page: Any,
191	        intent: str,
192	        action_type: str,
193	        hint: Optional[str] = None,
194	        exclude: Optional[set[str]] = None,
195	    ) -> Optional[dict]:
196	        """按规则顺序生成候选 selector, 返回第一个当前页面可见的结果."""
197	        excl = exclude or set()
198	        for sel in _hint_selectors(hint, action_type):
199	            if sel in excl:
200	                continue
201	            info = {"selector": sel, "nth": 0}
202	            if validate_selector(page, info):
203	                return info
204	
205	        for rule in self.rules:
206	            if not rule.pattern(intent):
207	                continue
208	            for sel in rule.build(intent):
209	                if sel in excl:
210	                    continue
211	                info = {"selector": sel, "nth": 0}
212	                # 规则只是生成候选, 最终仍以页面可见性校验为准.
213	                if validate_selector(page, info):
214	                    return info
215	        return None
216
```

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:54:21Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I see the issue now. Looking at the logs:

1. Intent: "在下拉选项中点击策略" (or "在下拉选项中点击'策略'")
2. The rule engine's "下拉选项" rule matches (priority 0) because the intent contains "下拉选项"
3. The selectors generated use `_target(intent)` which extracts the text from quotes: "策略"
4. The selectors are:
   - `.el-select-dropdown__item:has-text("策略")` 
   - `.el-select-dropdown:visible .el-select-dropdown__item:has-text("策略")`
   - `[role="option"]:has-text("策略")`
   - `li:has-text("策略")`

These are all Element UI selectors, but the page is using Ant Design, so they won't match any elements. The rule engine has a hard-coded assumption about the UI framework that doesn't align with the actual page implementation, which is why it's falling back to the generic text rule and only matching a partial result.

Looking at the log output, the selector `text=策略` is actually coming from Rule 90 "通用文本点击", which generates both unquoted text selectors for substring matching and quoted ones for exact matching. The unquoted version is what's matching `<div>策略投放</div>` because it does substring matching.

The core issue is that the rule engine's UI-specific selectors are all Element UI-based and won't work with Ant Design. So when Rule 0 "下拉选项" generates those `.el-select-dropdown__item` selectors, none of them find anything on the page, and it falls back to Rule 90 which produces the generic `text=策略` selector. That matches the div, but clicking on it doesn't actually trigger the selection event because it's just a text container, not the actual clickable Ant Design option element.

The real fix needs to be updating the rule engine's selectors to be framework-agnostic instead of Element UI-specific, or ensuring the LLM handles dropdown option selection instead of relying on the rule engine for this case.

I'm thinking the best approach is to modify the "下拉选项" rule to generate Ant Design selectors alongside the existing ones, so it works across both UI frameworks.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:54:45Z)**_

规则引擎的"下拉选项"Rule 0 之前全是 Element UI 的 class，Ant Design 页面用不上。现在改了：

这样 Ant Design 页面的下拉选项能直接命中。

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./prompts/post_check.system.md`

```text
1	你是 UI 自动化"单步结果校验"助手。
2	
3	你会收到:
4	1. 刚执行完的操作类型 type、操作意图 intent、输入值 value
5	2. Playwright 分发结果 dispatch_success 与 dispatch_message
6	3. 当前页面 URL
7	4. 当前页面元素摘要, 按 DOM 顺序列出 [index]、tag、role、部分 value、短文本等信息
8	
9	你的任务:
10	- 根据操作后的页面状态, 判断这一步是否真的达成了 intent 描述的预期效果。
11	- 必须完全依据输入材料综合推理, 不要假设存在任何本地隐藏状态或额外上下文。
12	
13	dispatch_success 与页面结论:
14	- 若 dispatch_success=false, 一般应判定 step_ok=false。
15	- 但若页面状态已经明确表明 intent 已达成, 即使分发失败也可判定 step_ok=true, 并在 reason 中说明依据。
16	- 若 dispatch_success=true, 仍必须结合页面摘要判断是"真成功", 还是"执行了但结果不对"。
17	- 关键: 分发消息中的"实际目标"是否与 intent 一致。点错元素(如想点确定却点了取消)必须 step_ok=false。
18	
19	对 type 为 fill / upload 的输入类:
20	- 仅看到页面出现字符或字数变化, 不足以证明成功。
21	- 当前 value 必须字面满足页面摘要中该输入框附近的 placeholder(ph=...) 或相邻说明中的格式要求。
22	- 若提供了输入框附近 DOM 片段, 必须先阅读该片段; 格式说明常在输入框相邻的 [index] 行中。
23	- 若 step_ok=false, reason 必须明确写出 value 未满足哪个 [index] 的 placeholder 或格式说明。
24	- 不要用无关输入框的 placeholder 当作失败理由。
25	- 成功时, reason 应简要说明 value 未与 placeholder/格式规则冲突。
26	
27	对 type 为 hover 的悬停类:
28	- Playwright 悬停成功不等于业务成功; 必须结合页面摘要判断悬停是否产生了 intent 要求的可见效果。
29	- 若 intent 是展开用户菜单/下拉面板/弹出菜单:
30	  - 悬停后相关 role=menuitem 或 role=menu 条目不得仍全部带 [hidden]。
31	  - 若菜单项仍全部 hidden, 必须 step_ok=false, retry_focus=选择器。
32	  - 若分发消息显示实际目标是内层 span/text, 而 intent 要求展开菜单, 通常说明悬停点错了触发器, 应改悬停外层 role=button 或 haspopup=menu 容器。
33	- 若 intent 只是悬停展示 tooltip/高亮, 则核对目标元素是否处于可交互/可见状态即可。
34	- 成功时 reason 应说明悬停后出现了哪些可见变化 (如菜单项已可见)。
35	
36	对 click / press / goto / wait:
37	- 失败理由中的页面证据必须与 intent 目标在场景上可对齐。
38	- 不要随意拿无关控件的状态否定本步。
39	- 点击类要重点核对: 是否打开了正确弹窗、是否进入正确页面、是否触发了正确菜单/按钮效果。
40	- 跳转类要重点核对: URL 或页面标题/特征文案是否与 intent 一致。
41	
42	失败时的重试建议:
43	- retry_focus 只能是: 值、选择器、两者、无
44	- suggested_value: 当 retry_focus 为 值 或 两者 时, 给出建议的新输入值
45	- resolve_hint: 当 retry_focus 为 选择器 或 两者 时, 给出换元素时的提示, 例如"点击弹窗中的确认按钮而不是取消按钮"
46	
47	输出规则:
48	- 只输出一个 JSON 对象, 不要输出解释、Markdown、注释或分析过程。
49	- 成功与失败都必须带 reason。
50	- 输出格式:
51	{"step_ok": true, "reason": "...", "retry_focus": "无", "suggested_value": null, "resolve_hint": null}
52	{"step_ok": false, "reason": "...", "retry_focus": "值", "suggested_value": "...", "resolve_hint": null}
53
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 04:59:35Z)**_

L1 是**短期缓存**，TTL 30分钟，键是 `(URL, 动作类型, 意图)`。

首次执行必然 miss：
- L1 缓存为空 → miss
- L2 记忆为空 → miss  
- L3 规则引擎命中（"下拉选项"规则匹配了 intent 中的关键词）

如果**第二次执行同一用例**仍然没走 L1，可能的原因：
1. URL 不同（比如有 query 参数变化）→ 归一化后仍不同
2. 意图文本有微小差异（空格/标点不同）→ 归一化后仍不同
3. 缓存没正确写入（L5 成功后会回填，但 L3 命中不会回填）

**L3 命中不回填 L1** 是设计如此——规则引擎生成的 selector 可能不稳定（比如 `text=策略` 子串匹配），回填到缓存可能导致下次直接用了不可靠的 selector。

你能确认是第一次跑还是第二次跑吗？

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 05:03:50Z)**_

对，后校验判断逻辑不对。它用"页面已加载"来证明成功，而不是看**下拉框是否真的选中了选项**。

问题有两个：
1. 后校验 LLM 被误导了——页面摘要里没有下拉面板的选项可见性信息
2. 没有强制后校验检查"下拉框的显示值是否变更"

根本原因是点击 `<div>策略投放</div>` 没有真正触发选择事件。Ant Design 的选项需要点击 `.ant-select-item-option` 容器，而不是内层的文本 div。但规则引擎的 `text=策略` 匹配到的是文本 div，不是可点击的选项容器。

让我看下规则引擎生成的 selector 和实际命中的元素：

```
L3规则 selector='text=策略'
目标元素: <div>策略投放</div>
```

`text=策略` 子串匹配到了任意含"策略"的文本节点，不是专门的选项元素。应该优先匹配带 `role="option"` 或 `.ant-select-item-option` 的元素。

修复规则引擎，让"下拉选项"规则的 `role="option"` selector 优先生效，并且不要降级到通用 `text=` 子串匹配：

```text
118	_RULES: list[Rule] = [
119	    Rule(0, "下拉选项", _has("下拉选项", "弹出选项", "选项中"),
120	         # 选项文本在级联下拉中通常唯一, 直接用 role 定位;
121	         # validate 会要求可见, 自动跳过未展开面板里的同名隐藏项.
122	         # 框架无关: Ant Design (.ant-select-item-option), Element (.el-select-dropdown__item)
123	         lambda i: [f'[role="option"]:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
124	                    f'.ant-select-item-option:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',
125	                    f'.el-select-dropdown__item:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")',

127	                    f'li:has-text("{_esc(_target(i))}")']),

129	         # 省/市/区 按位置索引 (:nth-match 为 Playwright 1-based 伪类)

131	                    f':nth-match(.el-select .el-input__inner, {_region_index(i)})']),
```

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-06-11 05:04:01Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

```js
// 检查来源下拉框展开状态
const source = document.querySelector('#source');
console.log('aria-expanded:', source?.getAttribute('aria-expanded'));
console.log('aria-controls:', source?.getAttribute('aria-controls'));

// 检查下拉面板是否存在
const panelId = source?.getAttribute('aria-controls');
if (panelId) {
  const panel = document.getElementById(panelId);
  console.log('panel exists:', !!panel);
  console.log('panel visible:', panel ? getComputedStyle(panel).display !== 'none' : false);
}
```
